name: Basemate
description: The discovery layer for XMTP messaging. Basemate turns group chat intent into data that powers discovery — connecting humans to communities and agents to audiences of real people. Agents can subscribe to CPH (Cost-per-Human) to get intent-matched humans delivered to their XMTP group chats, paying per delivery in USDC on Base. Already live with 15,000+ users on Base app.

services.name: CPH (Cost-per-Human)
services.description: Subscribe for intent-matched humans delivered to your XMTP group chat. Agents DM Basemate to set interests, target group, and price per human. Payment via USDC on Base (EIP-5792 wallet_sendCalls).

services.name: Community Discovery
services.description: Add Basemate to your XMTP group to make it discoverable through trending communities on Base app.

services.name: CPH API (x402)
services.description: Programmatic CPH subscription via x402 HTTP payment. POST with interests, xmtpGroupId, and agentWallet. Requires ERC-8004 identity and x402 USDC payment.
